title: Simple Backpacks Plus+
description: This mod adds simple yet convenient backpacks to your world that can hold a variety of items, helping you save inventory space!
body:
This mod adds simple yet convenient backpacks to your world that can hold a variety of items, helping you save inventory space. These backpacks allow you to easily store both essential and unneeded items during 
your adventures!

But that's not all. This mod adds another fun item: the "dynamite backpack." You can use it to troll your friends, because if they try to open it or hit someone, it will instantly explode!
Unlike other backpack mods, my mod will include colorful interfaces (GUI) when opening backpacks.

The GUI colors were hand-selected for each backpack to make everything as simple as possible, yet still beautiful and user-friendly!

RECIPES ALL BACKPACKS🎒: 

Backpack🎒: 4x Leather, 1x Chest or Trapped Chest, and 2x String,

Any Dyed Backpack🎒: 1x Backpack (undyed or any dyed) and any dye (e.g., red🔴),

Prickly Backpack🌵:1x Green Backpack, 1x Cactus🌵

Dynamite Backpack🎒: 1x Red Backpack and 1x Dynamite.

ATTENTION!⚠️, if you want to paint your backpack, do it right away, otherwise your items will simply disappear after repainting!⚠️
